title: Die Gezeichneten
actors: Adele Reuter-Eichberg, Vladimir Gajdarov, Polina Piekowskaja
plot: Based on the 1918 novel 'Elsker hverandre' by Aage Madelung, the film follows various lives, one of which is Jewish girl Hanne Liebe, as she grows up, and experiences the pains of living as a Jew in Russia, leading to a revolution.
